QR code fixtures

Exercises the QR pipeline: same-origin canvas decode, cross-origin image decode (service-worker fallback), and dynamic src swap. A dangerous/unverified QR should get a warning overlay drawn on top of it so it cannot be casually scanned with a phone.

1. Cross-origin QR image (service-worker decode fallback)

2. Same-origin canvas QR

3. Dynamically injected QR (after 2s)
